---
title: "Chapter 2: Descriptive Statistics"
---

# Descriptive Statistics

## Overview

This chapter covers basic descriptive statistics and provides some exercises on how to compute them in R.

## Learning Objectives

After completing this chapter, you will be able to:

- Describe datasets systematically
- Understand and calculate measures of central tendency, variability, covariance and correlation
- Run and write code in quarto markdown notebooks

## Lecture Slides

- [Descriptive Statistics](slides/descriptive_stats.qmd)
